rationale: Old Hangul ㆄ for /f/ (NIKL uses ㅍ which loses /f//p/ distinction). 'fish' showcases /f/ + /ɪ/ + /ʃ/.
Old Hangul ㅸ (light-b) for /v/. Korean ㅂ would lose voicing distinction.
Sibyeok ㅼ (s+t) for English think-/θ/. Adjacent /ŋ/ → ㆁ받침 → 잉. Final /k/ → 크.
Sibyeok ㅽ (s+b) for English this-/ð/. Final /s/ → ㅅ받침 (NIKL-style coda absorption).
Banchieum ㅿ (vanished sibilant) for /z/. Korean ㅈ confuses /z/ and /dʒ/.
Old jamo ᄶ for /ʒ/. /ɑː/=ㆍ + length. Stress not marked here.
Old ᄾ for /ʃ/. NIKL splits as 시오 (slightly different).
Sschangㆅ for German /x/ (Bach). Word-final → not 받침 (NIKL: 바흐 with 으-syll instead). UHPS-full keeps ㆅ.
Yeoeumridi ᄛ for French uvular /ʁ/. NIKL collapses /r/ /ʁ/ /ɾ/ all into ㄹ. Engine composes 'p+a' to 파.
Nieun-cieuc ㅥ for Spanish/Italian palatal nasal /ɲ/. /ɲ+a/ palatalizes to ya glide. Stressed on 나.
Yeo ㆎ for open-mid back rounded /ɔː/. NIKL collapses /ɔ/ /o/ both → ㅗ.
Arae-a ㆍ for open back /ɑː/. With /f/=ㆄ, length, primary stress, /ð/=ㅽ. Master case.
ŋ at coda → ㆁ받침 auto-collapses to standard ㅇ받침 (NFC). Output is plain 싱.
Length marker ː kept verbatim. NIKL drops length completely.
Primary stress as middledot · attached to stressed vowel. middledot is default tone_style.
Secondary stress as ˗ (modifier minus). Primary on '메·이'. Both stress levels preserved.
High level tone (Mandarin 1성). arrow style: ¯. Default tone_style for tone-bar IPA.
Rising tone (Mandarin 2성). arrow ↗.
Dipping tone (Mandarin 3성). arrow ↘↗ shows the fall-rise contour.
Falling tone (Mandarin 4성). arrow ↘.
Diphthong /aɪ/ → 아이 (two syllables in Hangul). 'h' onset.
/eɪ/ diphthong → 에이.
/oʊ/ → 오우. Korean approximation.
/aʊ/ → 아우.
/ɔɪ/ uses ㆎ for the open-o + ㅣ glide.
/θ/=ㅼ + /r/=ㄹ + /iː/. Cluster with length.
Initial /s/+/t/+/r/ cluster + length + final stop. 't' absorbs as ㅌ받침 to '스'.
Schwa /ə/ → 어. /v/=ㅸ at end. Stress on second syllable.
Rhotic schwa /ɚ/ → 어 (same as plain schwa in UHPS-full). Compare with /ə/ case S29.
French nasal /ɛ̃/ → ㅔ + ㆁ받침 (collapses to ㅇ받침 in NFC). /v/=ㅸ. v3.32 fix: _compose_with_jong now accepts ㆁ via ㅇ remap.
French /ɑ̃/ → ㆍ + ㆁ separate (한글 완성형 ㆍ에 받침 결합 불가). v3.34 fix: C+V_NASAL OLD vowel branch에서 ㆁ 분리 추가.
/tsu/ → 추 (Japanese loanword convention). NIKL: 츠우 separated; UHPS-full: contracted to 추.
/dʒ/ → ㅈ. /ɑː/=ㆍ. Word-final /z/=ㅿ.
/tʃ/ → ㅊ. /iː/. /z/=ㅿ at end.
Initial cluster /br/, length, final /ð/=ㅽ.
garage: schwa, stress, /ɑː/=ㆍ length, final /ʒ/=ᄶ.
Greek θεός: /θ/=ㅼ. Stress on second syllable.
Russian жить: engine produces 'ᄶ읕' (with ㅌ받침). Spec: palatalized /tʲ/ should be ㄷ받침. v3.x todo.
